meaning: n.女游泳衣,(体操运动员穿的)紧身衣
examples: Two or three times, the terrible volleys from Porte Maillot had made him jump, with his ears pricked up like a hunting-dog;
Typically, Mr. Maillot shows little interest in ballet steps of any finesse or variety.
Thus far, Mr. Maillot's "Opus 40, " with contributions from two American artists, best showed off the troupe.
Elsewhere in that note, Mr. Maillot refers to an "arch of candles, " which the company did not bring on tour for these performances.
